name: Nebius Group N.V.

profile.description: Nebius Group is an AI infrastructure company providing GPU cloud computing services. Q1 2026 revenue of $399M (up 684% YoY). The company targets $7-9B annualized revenue by end 2026 with $46B contracted backlog from Meta and Microsoft.

innovation.label: STRONG
innovation.analysis: Scored 9/10 based on track record, AI deployment, market position, pipeline visibility, and R&D intensity. See yfinance data and web research for evidence [1].

inspiration.label: DEVELOPING
inspiration.analysis: Scored 5/10 based on mission quality, community impact, employee retention, and insider buying signals [1].

infrastructure.label: STRONG
infrastructure.analysis: Mechanically scored on available metrics. Liquidity passes ($3,652,623,673 daily) [1].

ai_resilience.label: HIGH RISK
ai_resilience.analysis: AI Risk Protection (3/9) + AI Opportunity (1/1) = 4/10. Scored based on business model's structural exposure or immunity to AI disruption [1].

infinite_game.summary: Scored 8/10 using 3-2-2-2-1 weighted framework (Just Cause, Courage, Trust, Flexibility, Rivals).
